title: ToolInventoryItem
description: A single tool available to an agent.

tool_name.description: Unique name of the tool available to this agent.

external_system.description: The external system or API this tool connects to, if any.

data_classification.description: The data classification level for data accessed via this tool.

access_mode.description: The access mode for this tool (e.g., read-only, read-write).

control_status.description: Whether controls for this tool are implemented, partial, planned, or not applicable.
